entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (P00075) awarded to EDFINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION (P00073), TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR CHANGE REQUESTS 6385 AND 6427.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (P00085) awarded to EDFINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO CONTRACT ED-FSA-12-D-0005 IS REVISE THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT. THE REVISION INCREASES APPLICABLE RATES DUE TO THE LATEST EMPLOYMENT COST INDEX RELEASE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
